creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
Source tarball location has changed, due to release of IMAP 4.5-BETA.
Proper patches for 4.5-Beta should follow sometime this weekend.

Fix: Until I will prepare proper patches for 4.5-Beta please apply the
following quickfix (just to make sure the newly 3.1 branch to be released
won't get a stale port).

 Thanks !
 Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)

How-To-Repeat: 
  'make fetch' in ports/mail/imap-uw/
